name: Tom Robinson Band
description: '''Tom Robinson Band''' (TRB) are a British [[Rock music|rock]] band, established in 1976 by singer, songwriter and bassist [[Tom Robinson]]. The band's debut single "[[2-4-6-8 Motorway]]" was a top five hit on the [[UK Singles Chart]] in 1977, and their third single, "Up Against the Wall", is seen by some as a classic punk rock single; while their debut album, ''[[Power in the Darkness]]'' (1978), is regarded as a definitive late-1970s punk album. Their song "[[Glad to Be Gay]]" is considered a British national gay anthem.
